name: Sticky Cats
description:
Sticky Cats is a 2 - 4 player party game, where players must steal the fish and escape out the window while sticking to everything and causing mayhem along the way.
Gamepad Controls:

Start/triangle button: Join game
Joystick: Move/aim for jumping
A or X button : Jump
Back button: Restart level
Keyboard Controls:
Enter: Join game
WASD/Arrow keys: Move/aim for jumping
Space: Jump
R: Restart level
Credits:
Jem Smith - Design and code
@jemmiwinks
Jason Sutherland - Design, art, and audio
@DriftPrism
Follow @stickycatsgame on Twitter
Please get in touch if you have any feedback, issues, or questions, and we’ll try and help.
Thanks for playing!

name: Cursed Apartment
description:
Cursed Apartment is a multiplayer and single-player horror game where you need to be attentive to not overlook any anomalies on floors. Use the elevator to reach floor 1 and escape before monsters get you. When you miss an anomaly, elevator will glitch and take you back to the highest floor.
STORY: You wake up in your apartment. A mysterious voice from a recorder tells you that you are trapped in a cursed building infested with anomalies and monsters. You need to escape by reaching floor 1.
PLAYTIME: 30 - 60 minutes

GAME MODES
Choose Exit 8 game mode - press up when there's anomaly, press down when no anomalies

Choose Escape game mode - remove anomalies by capturing them with your camera


Disclaimer: Game modes can only be chosen when creating online room. More content is available in steam version.

FEATURES
Anomalies
Deadly monsters
Multiplayer with proximity voice chat
Short loop gameplay
Translated into multiple languages
